items.title:
[正面] 上头的卡牌游戏 克苏鲁风格 roguelite 每局都好玩，1周玩了快60小时。。。福利很好 
PV...
items.summary:
上头的卡牌游戏 克苏鲁风格 roguelite 每局都好玩，1周玩了快60小时。。。福利很好 
PVE 算力构筑 对的上xp的 一玩就是天亮了系列 
送的和活动给的资源非常多， 主线做做 活动玩玩 ，不氪金游戏自带送的4小只强度很高 搭配很灵活配队不死绑，自由度非常高 ，0氪就能全破 能体验到游戏所有内容，有点追求的 氪完双倍就能爽玩
PVP 对战 纯公平 良心卡牌竞技 ，现在这样的二游卡牌 PVP真不多了
刚入坑7天 分享点4月还能用的兑换码 

HVGX-HLDX-QKKN 
QKBQ-SSDG-JZYU  
Catsgift  
Dc5000  
Silverkey  
MistSequence
RMUE-RVQY-XKWE 
RCSV-DPLV-KQPP

邀请码 ICG55AVJZM 还可以拿 300 +200

能玩的下去的话,steam可以加一下好友一起发育

items.title:
[负面] Edit: BOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!
I thought this game had coo...
items.summary:
Edit: BOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!
I thought this game had cool devs which care more about their game than their money, but turn out they are the same scummy parasites as most others sneaking in ever more convoluted currency ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ to exploit their playerbase!
♥♥♥♥ you wholeheartedly! May you choke on your fake paper money!!!

Too bad about the game itself, which I really enjoyed (my initial positive review still is true):

Just sitting in my hideout menu hits me hard in the nostalgia melancholy feels with that absolutely gorgeous music..

As I start the next mission a new soul-crushingly beautiful little tune plays and I again just sit there in awe..

Then I find out you literally unlock the massive soundtrack (200+ songs!) bit by bit as you progress the story AND you can listen to all of them in your archives AND select one of them as your hideout Theme..

Plus we have:
The most dense and wonderfully melancholic overall atmosphere
Super rich lore and so much to learn about this world
An epic story which got you hooked from the start
Many interesting and awesomly designed characters
THE ARTSTYLE!!

...Morimens is just oozing atmosphere which fully immerses you in its wonderful world and mystique!

I might be fanboying quite a bit but WHAT A FREAKIN MASTERPIECE! 

Oh and the GAMEPLAY WTF!! How can a game that excells in all of the above ALSO have one of the best, most interesting and complex (in a good way!) strategic combat, team-building and character development?!

10/10 beautiful tears of memory!

items.title: [正面] Love the game, especially the story. The lovecraft...
items.summary: Love the game, especially the story. The lovecraftian dark fiction with many factions pursuing their own goals. The worldbuilding up to that point is also splendid, with bits of information to keep the mysterious past. Min-maxing is fun, though i am only having to do it now in later parts, quite a lot so. I basically have all the awakeners to try out different builds and synergies, all i had to do to get the resources for the pulls was playing the game.

items.title: [正面] 每次登陆更新都卡进度条，居然用两个小时，真是离谱开门离谱到家了。。。

items.title: [正面] Slay the Spire gameplay + Reverse 1999-like story ...
items.summary:
Slay the Spire gameplay + Reverse 1999-like story but lovecraftian, story has been cool so far
Morimens is also generous with pulls, so there's no issue w/ progressing w/o spending money

items.title: [正面] Gorgeous game with an amazing story direction. Hav...
items.summary:
Gorgeous game with an amazing story direction. Have been playing it almost nonstop for some months now on steam and my phone and couldn't be happier with it! I play a lot of games with the gacha element and I can say that morimens has my favourite use of that character getting mechanic. I have been a player from i think september 2024 and already acquried most of the characters (i would have them all but i prioritized dupes not getting new ones). 

tldr: Morimens is great and you should play it.
